name: Goodwill Keystone Area — Norristown
description: Goodwill accepts gently used clothing and textiles for resale. Items not sold are recycled.

name: Salvation Army Family Store — Lansdale
description: Donate clothing and household textiles. Proceeds support community programs.

name: Habitat for Humanity ReStore — Colmar
description: ReStore accepts gently used clothing and household goods. Sales fund Habitat home-building.

name: American Textile Recycling Service — Conshohocken
description: Unattended textile recycling bin. Accepts clothing in any condition — even stained or torn.

name: Planet Aid Drop-Off — Willow Grove
address: 102 N York Rd, Willow Grove, PA 19090
description: Yellow drop-off bin for clothing recycling. Items are sorted and reused or recycled globally.

name: Cradles to Crayons — Conshohocken
description: Provides children in need with essential clothing. Accepts new and gently used kids' items.

name: Montgomery County Transfer Station — Plymouth Meeting
description: County-operated facility accepting textiles for recycling. Part of the county's recycling program.

name: Philly AIDS Thrift @ Giovanni's Room — Cheltenham
address: 801 Old York Rd, Elkins Park, PA 19027
description: Thrift store benefiting AIDS-related causes. Accepts all clothing donations.

name: USAgain Textile Collection — Blue Bell
description: Green and yellow recycling bins for textile collection. Diverts clothing from landfills.

name: Community Thrift Shop — Ardmore
description: Volunteer-run thrift shop supporting local nonprofits. Accepts gently used clothing.

name: Green Drop — Horsham
description: Attended donation center benefiting military families. Drive-up, hassle-free drop-off.

name: Pottstown Cluster of Religious Communities
description: Faith-based organization distributing clothing to families in need in the Pottstown area.

name: H&M Garment Collecting — King of Prussia Mall
address: 160 N Gulph Rd, King of Prussia, PA 19406
description: Bring any brand clothing in any condition. Get a 15% off coupon per bag. Textiles are reworn, reused, or recycled.

name: The North Face Clothes the Loop — King of Prussia
address: 160 N Gulph Rd, King of Prussia, PA 19406
description: Drop off clothing and footwear of any brand at The North Face store for recycling through the Clothes the Loop program.

name: Madewell Denim Recycling — King of Prussia
address: 160 N Gulph Rd, King of Prussia, PA 19406
description: Bring old jeans (any brand) to Madewell and receive $20 off a new pair. Denim is recycled into housing insulation.

name: Planet Aid Drop-Off — Skippack
description: Yellow Planet Aid textile collection bin in Skippack Township. Accepts clothing, shoes, and textiles in any condition for reuse and recycling.
